title: Simply Swords x Excalibur
description: Excalibur texturing integrated into Simply Swords
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Simply Swords](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-swords) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack.

**Credits:**

*   *   [Maffhew](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) – Creator of Excalibur
    *   [Sweenuss](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sweenuss/projects)\- Creator of [Simply Swords](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-swords)
